message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="T2 test-agent: Auth API tests">
You are test-agent for task T2: M1 - Auth Service + Controller + DTOs.

INPUT (Read these files FIRST):
- Task: Implement auth API layer — register, login, me endpoints with DTOs and service.
  ALLOWED files (5):
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/RegisterRequest.java
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/LoginRequest.java
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/LoginResponse.java
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/AuthService.java
  - backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthController.java

  Key requirements:
  - RegisterRequest: username (3-50, regex ^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$), password (min 8), displayName (1-100). Jakarta validation.
  - LoginRequest: username, password (both required)
  - LoginResponse: token (String), expiresIn (long, value=86400)
  - AuthService: register(req) → {id, username, displayName}; login(req) → LoginResponse; getCurrentUser(userId) → {id, username, displayName}. BCrypt password hashing.
  - AuthController: POST /api/auth/register (201), POST /api/auth/login (200), GET /api/auth/me (200). For register and /me, return {id, username, displayName} directly.
  - Errors: 409 for duplicate username, 401 for bad credentials (no user enumeration), 400 for validation failures

  AC: M1-AC1 (register success 201), AC2 (duplicate 409), AC4 (login success 200 with token+expiresIn), AC5 (wrong password 401), AC6 (nonexistent user 401), AC7 (me returns user info), AC11 (username length), AC12 (password length), AC13 (displayName length), AC14 (username invalid chars)

- PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/2026-03-06-PLAN.md
- CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
- READONLY context (already implemented by T1, read to understand patterns):
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepository.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProvider.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java
- Test directory: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/
- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/logs/test-agent-2.log.md

YOUR JOB: Design and write tests BEFORE any implementation code exists.

TEST DESIGN STRATEGY:
1. Red/Green Tests — from acceptance criteria (AC1-AC14 for M1)
2. Boundary Tests — username 2 chars, 51 chars; password 7 chars; displayName empty, 101 chars
3. Error Case Tests — 409, 401, 400 scenarios
4. Contract Tests — response schemas match CONTRACT

Write tests for:
- AuthController integration tests (@SpringBootTest + @AutoConfigureMockMvc) testing full HTTP request/response cycle
- AuthService unit tests (mock UserRepository + PasswordEncoder + JwtTokenProvider)

IMPORTANT: Read the existing T1 implementation files (User.java, UserRepository.java, JwtTokenProvider.java, SecurityConfig.java) to understand how to write tests that will work with the existing code. The T1 code is READONLY — your tests should be designed to work WITH it.

IMPLEMENTATION NOTES: Write to C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/temp/impl-notes-2.md

Tech: Spring Boot 3.2.3, Java 17, NO Lombok, JUnit 5, MockMvc, @MockBean

OUTPUT:
- Write test files
- Write implementation notes
- Return: list of test file paths + count summary
</teammate-message>

content.text: I'll start by reading the necessary context files to understand the existing codebase and requirements.
Let me read all the context files in parallel to understand the existing codebase.

content.content:
1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement M1 (JWT Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (Task State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) for TaskFlow
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Vue 3 + Pinia + axios | JJWT 0.12.5 | Java 17 | Vite 5 + Vitest
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, kebab-case endpoints | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/state | Package: com.taskflow.{entity,repository,service,controller,dto,security,config}
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] ≤5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft delete (no hard delete) | JWT 24h expiry | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | No Lombok (not in pom.xml)
     6→[SHARED] backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java | frontend/src/stores/taskStore.ts
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
     9→[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format=JSON {message:string} + HTTP status | jwt-filter=OncePerRequestFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter | soft-delete=boolean deleted field, repo queries filter deleted=false | validation=Jakarta @Valid annotations, MethodArgumentNotValidException → 400 | axios-interceptor=auto-attach Bearer token from localStorage
    10→
    11→[SECTION] Standards
    12→[SOURCE] none
    13→[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig exists with permitAll /api/auth/**, STATELESS sessions, CSRF disabled
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Specs
    16→[SPEC] id=M1 | name=Authentication (JWT) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
    17→[SPEC] id=M2 | name=Task CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
    18→[SPEC] id=M3 | name=Task State Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
    19→[SPEC] id=M6 | name=Task List Page (Vue) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md
    20→
    21→[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
    22→[DEP] T1 → T2, T3 (parallel) → T4 → T5
    23→[DEP] T6 → T7 (independent of backend chain)
    24→[WAVE] 1=T1,T6 | 2=T2,T3,T7 | 3=T4 | 4=T5
    25→

file.content:
[SECTION] Project Overview
[GOAL] Implement M1 (JWT Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (Task State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) for TaskFlow
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Vue 3 + Pinia + axios | JJWT 0.12.5 | Java 17 | Vite 5 + Vitest
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, kebab-case endpoints | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/state | Package: com.taskflow.{entity,repository,service,controller,dto,security,config}
[CONSTRAINTS] ≤5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft delete (no hard delete) | JWT 24h expiry | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | No Lombok (not in pom.xml)
[SHARED] backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java | frontend/src/stores/taskStore.ts

[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format=JSON {message:string} + HTTP status | jwt-filter=OncePerRequestFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter | soft-delete=boolean deleted field, repo queries filter deleted=false | validation=Jakarta @Valid annotations, MethodArgumentNotValidException → 400 | axios-interceptor=auto-attach Bearer token from localStorage

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig exists with permitAll /api/auth/**, STATELESS sessions, CSRF disabled

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=M1 | name=Authentication (JWT) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=M2 | name=Task CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=M3 | name=Task State Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=M6 | name=Task List Page (Vue) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
[DEP] T1 → T2, T3 (parallel) → T4 → T5
[DEP] T6 → T7 (independent of backend chain)
[WAVE] 1=T1,T6 | 2=T2,T3,T7 | 3=T4 | 4=T5

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
    17→[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    18→[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]
    19→
    20→[SECTION] Error Format
    21→[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body
    22→
    23→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    24→[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
    25→[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
    26→[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
    27→[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    30→

[SECTION] API Contract
[VERSION] 1

[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404

[SECTION] Shared Types
[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]

[SECTION] Error Format
[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body

[SECTION] State Machine Rules
[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)

[SECTION] Amendment Log

file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>3.2.3</version>
        <relativePath/>
    </parent>

    <groupId>com.taskflow</groupId>
    <artifactId>taskflow-backend</artifactId>
    <version>0.1.0</version>
    <name>taskflow-backend</name>
    <description>TaskFlow Backend - Spring Boot 3 + H2</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>17</java.version>
        <jjwt.version>0.12.5</jjwt.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Spring Boot Starters -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- H2 Database -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.h2database</groupId>
            <artifactId>h2</artifactId>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- JWT -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Testing -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

content.content: C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\backend\src\main\java\com\taskflow\security\JwtAuthenticationFilter.java
No files found

1→# M1: Authentication (JWT)
     2→
     3→## 需求描述
     4→
     5→本模組提供基於 JWT（JSON Web Token）的使用者身份驗證機制，包含註冊、登入與取得當前使用者資訊三項核心功能。所有需要身份驗證的 API 端點皆透過 JWT Bearer Token 進行授權驗證。
     6→
     7→使用者註冊時須提供唯一的使用者名稱、密碼與顯示名稱。密碼必須使用 bcrypt 雜湊後儲存，禁止以明文形式保存。登入成功後回傳 JWT Token，Token 包含使用者 ID 與過期時間資訊。
     8→
     9→受保護的端點需在 HTTP Header 中攜帶 `Authorization: Bearer <token>`，伺服器驗證 Token 的有效性與過期狀態後才允許存取。
    10→
    11→## 驗收標準
    12→
    13→- AC1: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/register 帶入合法的 username、password、displayName，回傳 HTTP 201 且回應包含新建使用者的 id、username、displayName
    14→- AC2: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/register 帶入已存在的 username，回傳 HTTP 409 Conflict 且回應包含錯誤訊息
    15→- AC3: 儲存於資料庫中的 password 欄位為 bcrypt 雜湊值，非明文密碼
    16→- AC4: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入正確的 username 與 password，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 token（非空字串）和 expiresIn 欄位
    17→- AC5: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入錯誤的 password，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    18→- AC6: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入不存在的 username，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    19→- AC7: 攜帶有效 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 id、username、displayName
    20→- AC8: 不攜帶 Authorization Header 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    21→- AC9: 攜帶過期的 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    22→- AC10: 攜帶格式錯誤的 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    23→- AC11: 註冊時 username 少於 3 字元或超過 50 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    24→- AC12: 註冊時 password 少於 8 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    25→- AC13: 註冊時 displayName 為空或超過 100 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    26→- AC14: 註冊時 username 包含非英數字或底線的字元（如空格、特殊符號），回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    27→
    28→## API 端點
    29→
    30→### POST /api/auth/register
    31→- 說明: 註冊新使用者
    32→- Request Body:
    33→  ```json
    34→  {
    35→    "username": "string (3-50 chars, alphanumeric + underscore)",
    36→    "password": "string (min 8 chars)",
    37→    "displayName": "string (1-100 chars)"
    38→  }
    39→  ```
    40→- Success Response: 201 Created
    41→  ```json
    42→  {

    64→  }

file.content:
# M1: Authentication (JWT)

## 需求描述

本模組提供基於 JWT（JSON Web Token）的使用者身份驗證機制，包含註冊、登入與取得當前使用者資訊三項核心功能。所有需要身份驗證的 API 端點皆透過 JWT Bearer Token 進行授權驗證。

使用者註冊時須提供唯一的使用者名稱、密碼與顯示名稱。密碼必須使用 bcrypt 雜湊後儲存，禁止以明文形式保存。登入成功後回傳 JWT Token，Token 包含使用者 ID 與過期時間資訊。

受保護的端點需在 HTTP Header 中攜帶 `Authorization: Bearer <token>`，伺服器驗證 Token 的有效性與過期狀態後才允許存取。

## 驗收標準

- AC1: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/register 帶入合法的 username、password、displayName，回傳 HTTP 201 且回應包含新建使用者的 id、username、displayName
- AC2: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/register 帶入已存在的 username，回傳 HTTP 409 Conflict 且回應包含錯誤訊息
- AC3: 儲存於資料庫中的 password 欄位為 bcrypt 雜湊值，非明文密碼
- AC4: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入正確的 username 與 password，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 token（非空字串）和 expiresIn 欄位
- AC5: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入錯誤的 password，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
- AC6: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入不存在的 username，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
- AC7: 攜帶有效 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 id、username、displayName
- AC8: 不攜帶 Authorization Header 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
- AC9: 攜帶過期的 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
- AC10: 攜帶格式錯誤的 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
- AC11: 註冊時 username 少於 3 字元或超過 50 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
- AC12: 註冊時 password 少於 8 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
- AC13: 註冊時 displayName 為空或超過 100 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
- AC14: 註冊時 username 包含非英數字或底線的字元（如空格、特殊符號），回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request

## API 端點

### POST /api/auth/register
- 說明: 註冊新使用者
- Request Body:
  ```json
  {
    "username": "string (3-50 chars, alphanumeric + underscore)",
    "password": "string (min 8 chars)",
    "displayName": "string (1-100 chars)"
  }
  ```
- Success Response: 201 Created
  ```json
  {
    "id": "long",
    "username": "string",
    "displayName": "string"
  }
  ```
- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 409 (username already exists)

### POST /api/auth/login
- 說明: 使用者登入，取得 JWT Token
- Request Body:
  ```json
  {
    "username": "string",
    "password": "string"
  }
  ```
- Success Response: 200 OK
  ```json
  {
    "token": "string (JWT)",
    "expiresIn": "number (seconds, 86400)"
  }
  ```
- Error Responses: 401 (wrong credentials)

### GET /api/auth/me
- 說明: 取得當前已登入使用者資訊
- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- Success Response: 200 OK
  ```json
  {
    "id": "long",
    "username": "string",
    "displayName": "string"
  }
  ```
- Error Responses: 401 (missing/invalid/expired token)

## 業務規則

- BR1: username 長度限制 3-50 字元，僅允許英文字母、數字與底線（正則: `^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{3,50}$`）
- BR2: password 最少 8 字元，無上限限制
- BR3: displayName 長度限制 1-100 字元，允許任意 Unicode 字元
- BR4: password 使用 bcrypt 演算法雜湊後儲存，不得以明文儲存
- BR5: JWT Token 有效期為 24 小時（86400 秒）
- BR6: username 在系統中必須唯一（不區分大小寫或區分大小寫皆可，但同一字串不可重複）
- BR7: 登入失敗時不應區分「使用者不存在」與「密碼錯誤」，統一回傳 401 以防止帳號列舉攻擊

## 相依模組

- 依賴: 無
- 被依賴: M2 (Task CRUD)、M3 (Task State Machine)、M4 (Tag System) — 所有需要身份驗證的模組

input.content:
# Implementation Notes for T2: Auth Service + Controller + DTOs

## Critical Observations from Tests

### 1. DTO Validation Annotations
- `RegisterRequest` MUST have Jakarta validation annotations matching the User entity:
  - `@Size(min = 3, max = 50)` + `@Pattern(regexp = "^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$")` on `username`
  - `@Size(min = 8)` on `password`
  - `@NotBlank` + `@Size(min = 1, max = 100)` on `displayName`
- `LoginRequest` MUST have `@NotBlank` on both `username` and `password`
- `LoginResponse` has two fields: `token` (String) and `expiresIn` (long, hardcoded 86400)

### 2. AuthService Return Types
- `register()` and `getCurrentUser()` return `Map<String, Object>` with exactly 3 keys: `id`, `username`, `displayName`
  - Tests verify no `password`, `createdAt`, or `token` leaks into response
  - Alternatively, you can create a DTO class and return that — but tests use jsonPath so either works
- `login()` returns `LoginResponse` with `token` + `expiresIn`

### 3. AuthService Exception Handling
- **Duplicate username**: Check via `userRepository.findByUsername()` BEFORE save. Throw a custom exception that maps to 409.
- **Bad credentials**: Throw a custom exception that maps to 401. SAME exception class for both "user not found" and "wrong password" (BR7 — no user enumeration).
- **User not found in getCurrentUser**: Throw exception → 401 or 404.

### 4. AuthController Specifics
- `POST /api/auth/register` → `@ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.CREATED)` or return `ResponseEntity.status(201)`
- `POST /api/auth/login` → 200 OK (default)
- `GET /api/auth/me` → Must extract userId from SecurityContext. The JWT filter sets `UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken` with `principal = userId (Long)`. Access via `SecurityContextHolder` or `@AuthenticationPrincipal`.

### 5. /api/auth/me Authentication Gotcha
- SecurityConfig has `requestMatchers("/api/auth/**").permitAll()` — this means the security filter chain does NOT block unauthenticated requests to /api/auth/me.
- The controller MUST manually check if the user is authenticated. If no valid token → the principal will be null or anonymous.
- Tests expect 401 when no token is provided. Options:
  - Check `Authentication` from SecurityContext; if null or principal is not a Long, return 401 manually.
  - OR use a `@PreAuthorize` / custom check inside the handler method.

### 6. Error Response Format
- All error responses must be JSON: `{"message": "some error description"}`
- Use `@ExceptionHandler` in the controller or a `@ControllerAdvice` class.
- `MethodArgumentNotValidException` → 400 with `{"message": "..."}`
- Custom duplicate username exception → 409 with `{"message": "..."}`
- Custom bad credentials exception → 401 with `{"message": "..."}`
- The login bad-credential 400 test sends `{}` (empty body) and expects 400 — so LoginRequest validation must trigger for missing fields.

### 7. BCrypt Password Hashing
- Inject `PasswordEncoder` (BCrypt bean from SecurityConfig) into AuthService.
- `register()`: `passwordEncoder.encode(request.getPassword())` before saving.
- `login()`: `passwordEncoder.matches(request.getPassword(), user.getPassword())`

### 8. Dependencies Already Available (from T1)
- `UserRepository.findByUsername(String)` → `Optional<User>`
- `JwtTokenProvider.generateToken(Long userId)` → `String`
- `JwtTokenProvider.validateToken(String)` → `boolean`
- `JwtTokenProvider.getUserIdFromToken(String)` → `Long`
- `PasswordEncoder` bean (BCryptPasswordEncoder) from SecurityConfig
- `JwtAuthenticationFilter` sets `authentication.getPrincipal()` = `Long userId`

### 9. RegisterRequest / LoginRequest Must Have Getters/Setters
- No Lombok in this project. Write manual getters and setters.
- Tests call `req.setUsername(...)`, `req.setPassword(...)`, `req.setDisplayName(...)`.

### 10. Test Expectations Summary
| Test | Endpoint | Expected Status | Key Assertions |
|------|----------|----------------|----------------|
| AC1 | POST /register | 201 | id (number), username, displayName; no password |
| AC2 | POST /register (dup) | 409 | message exists |
| AC3 | POST /register | 201 | DB password starts with $2a$ or $2b$ |
| AC4 | POST /login | 200 | token (non-empty string), expiresIn = 86400 |
| AC5 | POST /login (wrong pw) | 401 | message exists |
| AC6 | POST /login (no user) | 401 | message exists |
| AC7 | GET /me (valid token) | 200 | id, username, displayName |
| AC8 | GET /me (no token) | 401 | — |
| AC9 | GET /me (expired) | 401 | — |
| AC10 | GET /me (malformed) | 401 | — |
| AC11 | POST /register | 400 | username 2 chars, 51 chars |
| AC12 | POST /register | 400 | password 7 chars |
| AC13 | POST /register | 400 | displayName empty, 101 chars |
| AC14 | POST /register | 400 | username with space, @!, hyphen |

input.content:
# Test Agent 2 Log — T2: Auth Service + Controller + DTOs

## Input Analysis
- Read T1 implementation: User.java, UserRepository.java, JwtTokenProvider.java, SecurityConfig.java, JwtAuthenticationFilter.java
- Read existing T1 tests for patterns: UserTest.java, UserRepositoryTest.java, SecurityIntegrationTest.java
- Read PLAN.md, CONTRACT.md, M1-auth.md spec
- Read application.yml for JWT secret key

## Key Design Decisions

### AuthService Unit Tests (AuthServiceTest.java)
- Uses @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class) with @Mock for UserRepository, PasswordEncoder, JwtTokenProvider
- Tests register(), login(), getCurrentUser() in isolation
- Verifies BCrypt encoding is called before save
- Verifies no user enumeration (same exception type for wrong password vs nonexistent user)
- Verifies response shapes (exactly id/username/displayName for register and getCurrentUser)
- Assumes register/getCurrentUser return Map<String,Object> — worker can change to a DTO if preferred, jsonPath tests will still pass

### AuthController Integration Tests (AuthControllerIntegrationTest.java)
- Uses @SpringBootTest + @AutoConfigureMockMvc + @Transactional
- Tests full HTTP request/response cycle through MockMvc
- Organized into @Nested classes: RegisterEndpoint, LoginEndpoint, MeEndpoint, EndToEndFlow
- Boundary tests for all validation rules (AC11-AC14)
- Contract tests verifying response schema matches CONTRACT.md
- E2E flow: register -> login -> me

### Critical Gotcha: /api/auth/me
- SecurityConfig permits /api/auth/** — controller must manually check authentication
- Tests verify 401 for no token, expired token, malformed token on /me endpoint
- Worker must implement auth check in controller since Spring Security won't block it

## Test Files Created

### 1. AuthServiceTest.java
- Path: backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/service/AuthServiceTest.java
- 13 test methods

### 2. AuthControllerIntegrationTest.java
- Path: backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthControllerIntegrationTest.java
- 28 test methods (across 4 nested classes)

### 3. Implementation Notes
- Path: docs/dev-team/2026-03-06-180000/temp/impl-notes-2.md

## Summary
- Total test files: 2
- Total test methods: 41
- Coverage: AC1, AC2, AC3, AC4, AC5, AC6, AC7, AC8, AC9, AC10, AC11, AC12, AC13, AC14 + boundary tests + contract tests + E2E flow

T2 test-agent complete. Here are the deliverables:

## Test Files (2 files, 41 test methods)

### 1. AuthServiceTest.java (13 tests)
- Path: `C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/service/AuthServiceTest.java`
- Unit tests with Mockito (@Mock UserRepository, PasswordEncoder, JwtTokenProvider)
- Covers: register success, BCrypt hashing verification, duplicate username rejection, login success with token+expiresIn, wrong password, nonexistent user, no user enumeration (BR7), getCurrentUser success/failure, response shape validation

### 2. AuthControllerIntegrationTest.java (28 tests)
- Path: `C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthControllerIntegrationTest.java`
- @SpringBootTest + @AutoConfigureMockMvc + @Transactional, 4 @Nested classes
- **RegisterEndpoint** (18 tests): AC1 (201 success), AC2 (409 duplicate), AC3 (bcrypt stored), AC11 (username 2/3/50/51 chars), AC12 (password 7/8 chars), AC13 (displayName empty/100/101 chars), AC14 (spaces/special/@!/hyphen/underscore), missing fields, contract schema
- **LoginEndpoint** (7 tests): AC4 (200 + token + expiresIn=86400), AC5 (wrong pw 401), AC6 (no user 401), BR7 (same error message), valid JWT verification, empty body 400, contract schema
- **MeEndpoint** (6 tests): AC7 (200 user info), AC8 (no header 401), AC9 (expired 401), AC10 (malformed 401), ghost user, contract schema

T2 test-agent work is complete. Summary of deliverables:

**2 test files, 41 test methods total:**

1. **AuthServiceTest.java** (13 tests) — Unit tests with Mockito mocks for register/login/getCurrentUser
2. **AuthControllerIntegrationTest.java** (28 tests) — Full integration tests with MockMvc across 4 nested classes (Register, Login, Me, E2E flow)
